panels.description: Medium shot of Arthur speaking to Mina in a Victorian parlor, soft warm interior lighting, Arthur has an earnest and open expression, Mina is attentive.

bubbles.text: He spoke to me, Mina, very straightforwardly. He told me how dear I was to him...

panels.description: Close up of Arthur's face showing hesitation and trembling hands, soft focus background of a bookshelf, emotional tension.

bubbles.text: Could you love me in time? Do you care for someone else?

panels.description: Wide shot of the pair in the parlor; Arthur standing tall and grave, holding Mina's hands gently, a sense of respectful closure, vintage drawing room.

bubbles.text: If a woman's heart is free, a man might have hope. But if there is someone else... I hope you find happiness.

panels.description: Close up of Mina crying, wiping a tear from her cheek, letter blotted with ink in her hand, distressed and melancholic atmosphere.

bubbles.text: Oh, Mina dear, I can't help crying...

panels.description: Medium shot of Mr. Morris sitting beside Mina, attempting a jolly smile but looking visibly nervous, hands slightly clasped, Victorian garden setting through a window.

bubbles.text: Miss Lucy, I know I ain't good enough... but I guess if you wait till you find a man that is, you will be waiting forever.
